title: Commercial office tower, Type I-A, 90 ft — high-rise threshold
notes: Exercises COM-HIGH-RISE, which had no case touching the >75 ft path. Type I-A is UL for area/stories/height (Tables 506.2/504.4/504.3), isolating the high-rise check. The engine returns needs_review (warn) — high-rise is IBC 403's verify-the-systems prompt (smoke control, voice alarm, standby power), not a hard fail the engine can assert from scope alone.
plan_text:
CODE ANALYSIS A-0.1
Occupancy Group: B
Construction Type: I-A
Number of stories: 7
Building height: 90 ft
Per-story area: 18,000 sf
Fully sprinklered: yes
Design occupant load: 400
IECC: Title 24 Part 6
NFPA 13 sprinkler system. NFPA 72 fire alarm. Smoke control and standby power provided.
EXIT 1. EXIT 2. EXIT 3.
WC 20 LAV 12.

ground_truth.rationale: 90 ft exceeds the 75 ft threshold (IBC 403); engine flags needs_review to verify smoke control, voice alarm, and standby power.
Type I-A is UL for Group B area
Type I-A is UL for height
Type I-A is UL for stories
